_doc: DYDX unlock schedule from defillama.com/unlocks/dydx. 99.26% unlocked / 0.74% × 1b = ~7.4m DYDX still locked — vesting tail nearly complete. DL event panel shows daily-rate ongoing releases for Investors, Employees, Future Employees, User Trading Rewards. Community Treasury shows NEGATIVE delta (treasury accumulation, not unlock) which our compute should treat as not-an-unlock. The ongoing daily rate totals ~140K DYDX/day across release categories — schedule ends ~mid-2026.

events.note: User Trading Rewards 55,229 DYDX/day. Airdrop sell-prob bucket.
